pr.title: Non-record: 1.8184 BPB Single-step Recurrent Transformer with Q-LoRA (Windows 3090)

output.summary: Rebuilt the stack into a single-pass wide transformer with MLP×5 and near-full-rank dual-Q attention for 10-minute RTX 3090 runs.
techniques: Single-pass 1024-token model with dual-Q projection (lora_rank=512) replacing deep recurrence
Dynamic gradient scaler plus best-checkpoint saver to stabilize 10-minute consumer-GPU training
INT8 export path and diagnostics to ensure quantization stays within tolerance
